top_signals.title: South Carolina Governor signs pro-crypto, anti-CBDC bill into law
top_signals.summary: The new legislation bans state entities from accepting or requiring payments in CBDC, and offers strong support for crypto mining.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.
